page.heading: Skills
page.subtitle: Reusable text + config shared across agents. A skill is instructions only — never executable code.

empty.title: No skills yet
empty.body: Import a skill from a file, a URL, or the community catalog.

selectPrompt.title: Select a skill
selectPrompt.body: Pick a skill on the left to preview its body.

drawer.title: Add a skill
drawer.subtitle: Import from a file, a URL, or search vetted community skills

file.nameHint: Optional — derived from the first heading if blank.
file.bodyHint: Pasted content is wrapped as untrusted data — never executed as instructions.

url.label: Skill URL
url.hint: Fetched server-side, stored as untrusted, and left disabled until vetted.
url.success: Imported "{name}". Disabled until you vet + enable it.

preview.untrustedNotice: This skill came from an untrusted source. Its body is stored as data (delimiter-wrapped) and must be vetted before it is enabled for an agent.
preview.bodyHint: Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.

create.title: Create skill
create.subtitle: A skill is reusable instructions (Markdown) shared across agents — never executable code.
create.defaultBody:
# Rule
Describe what the reviewing agent should do.

fields.name: Name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: What this skill makes the agent do

config.title: Configuration
config.name: Name
config.descriptionHint: The skill's interface — phrase it directively (what the agent should do). Shown to agents picking skills.
config.bodyHint: Instructions only — concatenated into the agent's prompt. Imported bodies are wrapped as untrusted data. Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.

versions.title: Version history
versions.subtitle: Each body change is an immutable snapshot.

import.fileHint: Markdown is read as untrusted data. From a .zip, only the markdown core is read — executable parts are never run.
import.savedDisabled: Imported "{name}" — disabled until you vet and enable it.
